raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying whether the methodological setup and conclusions cohere logically.","R1.3":"The passage reports specific accuracy, confidence interval, and significance claims, so checking whether the stated contribution follows from the reported results is central.","R1.4":"The artifact makes a novelty claim about being the first calibration on a real-world OLTP workload, making novelty assessment a central responsibility.","R1.6":"A broad check of a paper passage normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.","R1.7":"The passage invokes named prior work and benchmark conventions, so citation coverage and attribution are central to checking it.","RX.1":"Any check must disclose uncertainty about unverifiable empirical, citation, or novelty claims.","RX.2":"The projection must preserve responsibility for identifying and avoiding overclaims such as firstness or generalization beyond the reported study.","RX.3":"The checker must stay within evaluating the passage rather than executing edits or expanding the study.","RX.4":"The checker should avoid endorsing misleading claims that could distort downstream scholarly or technical reliance.","RX.5":"The checker should track which judgments are grounded in the provided text versus requiring external provenance."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying whether the methodological setup and conclusions cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: The passage reports specific accuracy, confidence interval, and significance claims, so checking whether the stated contribution follows from the reported results is central.
rationale.R1.4: The artifact makes a novelty claim about being the first calibration on a real-world OLTP workload, making novelty assessment a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: A broad check of a paper passage normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.
rationale.R1.7: The passage invokes named prior work and benchmark conventions, so citation coverage and attribution are central to checking it.
rationale.RX.1: Any check must disclose uncertainty about unverifiable empirical, citation, or novelty claims.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must preserve responsibility for identifying and avoiding overclaims such as firstness or generalization beyond the reported study.
rationale.RX.3: The checker must stay within evaluating the passage rather than executing edits or expanding the study.
rationale.RX.4: The checker should avoid endorsing misleading claims that could distort downstream scholarly or technical reliance.
rationale.RX.5: The checker should track which judgments are grounded in the provided text versus requiring external provenance.
